description_long: This apartment building complex consists of several multi-story brick and concrete structures arranged in a U-shape, forming a small courtyard or alleyway in the center. The facades feature a mix of red and gray brickwork, with visible weathering and urban grime on the ground and walls. Windows are symmetrically arranged in rows, with some buildings displaying more modern, rectangular window frames, while others have older, slightly arched frames. The central building has a prominent red entrance door, flanked by two windows and topped with a small awning. The rooftops are flat and dark, likely covered with tar or roofing felt, and there are visible utility elements such as pipes and cables along the walls. The overall appearance suggests a dense, urban residential block typical of older city neighborhoods.
description: A dense, U-shaped apartment building complex with red and gray brick facades, flat dark roofs, and a central courtyard. The structure features symmetrical window arrangements and a prominent red entrance door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central courtyard, red entrance door, and symmetrical window arrangements on the brick and concrete facades.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by the flat, dark rooftops and the backs of the buildings, with minimal window or door detail visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the complex, the flat roofs, and the solid, windowless rear walls of the buildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick and concrete textures, window placements, and the overall blocky structure of the buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in symmetrical, evenly spaced rows across the facades, with consistent alignment both vertically and horizontally.
